Name: Caroline Bailey ’27
Description: Caroline is the co–general manager of WebDCR! She is an English major with a concentration in Creative Writing and a minor in Spanish. Originally from Arlington, VA, she could survive on Melodrama by Lorde if she were stranded on a deserted island.

Name: Joey Jerva ’27
Description: Joey is the co–general manager of WebDCR. He is a biochem and music major from Pinehurst, NC. If stranded on a desert island, he would bring The Replacements’ “Tim - Expanded” with him.

Name: Gracie Bartos ’27
Description: i’m a religion and classics major from peoria, az! at webdcr, i’m the social chair. my deserted island album is this empty northern hemisphere (gregory alan isakov)

Name: Gage Caswell ’29
Description: Gage is one of the News Directors at WebDCR. He is a film and computer science major from Penacook, New Hampshire. If he had to choose a desert island album, he would take Oh Dear by Isolde Lasoen.

Name: Nerissa Chin ’28
Description: Nerissa is webdcr’s art director. she’s an engineering mod studio art major from los angeles, ca. some fun facts are that she used to be a pre-professional ballet dancer and she has no driver’s license. if stranded on a desert island, she would bring imaginal disk by magdalena bay.

Name: Louisa Cook ’29
Description: Louisa is a history and art history major from Wellesley, Massachusetts. If stranded on a desert island, she would bring Tango in the Night by Fleetwood Mac.

Name: Vic Cosmo ’28
Description: Im a sophomore at Dart studying Government, Linguistics, and Education. I work as Art Director/Social for Radio and am from Salvador, Brazil. My current desert album would probably be Dire Straits.

Name: Annabel Furlong ’29
Description: Annabel is an operations director from Austin, Texas! She is a prospective Bio major and French minor. If she were stranded on a dessert island, she could listen to When We Were Friends by The Backseat Lovers forever and ever!

Name: Alex Duffield ’27
Description: Alex is WebDCR’s Treasurer! He is an economics and history double major hailing from laguna niguel, california. You should definitely ask him to do an Obama impression. If stranded on a desert island, he would bring The Grateful Dead’s - Europe ‘72 [Live] album.

Name: Mackenzie Morong ’27
Description: Mackenzie Morong is WebDCR's live events coordinator! She is an Earth Science major and film minor from MA, and can't wait to start her fourth year with radio in the fall. If stranded on a desert island, she would bring Welcome Interstate Managers by Fountains of Wayne.

Name: Sarah Price ’26
Description: Hi! I’m Sarah and I’m the Director of Music. I’m a ’26 from right outside DC on the Maryland side (the better side) and I’m majoring in psychology and in music. A fun fact about me is that I narrowly escaped death by goat when I was 3! If I were stuck on a desert island and could only bring one album, I would bring Bridge Over Troubled Water by Simon and Garfunkel :)

Name: Kaley Beth Roberts ’29
Description: Kaley Beth is a ’29 from Manchester, Kentucky! She intends on majoring in Film and Media modified with Economics and a minor in Public Policy! If stranded on a desert island, she would bring Kiss All The Time. Disco, Occasionally by Harry Styles.

Name: Claudia Shin ’28
Description: Claudia is webdcr’s co-marketing director and 26x summer co-gm! she is from los angeles, ca and studies film and government. claudia loves knitting, long woccoms, and her dog pepper.

Name: Avery Stern ’27
Description: Avery is our alumni relations and outreach director. She is a history major from Brooklyn, NY. Her desert island album is Sound of Silver by LCD Soundsystem

Name: Ryan Stern ’27
Description: Ryan is webdcr’s tech director. he is an engineering, math, and sociology major from livingston, nj. lowkey he is really cool does anybody know how i can get in touch with him

Name: James Underwood ’27
Description: James is the station historian at WebDCR. He is from beautiful Columbus, Ohio. If stranded on a desert island he would bring David Bowie’s “The Rise and Fall of Ziggy Stardust and the Spiders from Mars.”

Name: Nate Wayne ’28
Description: Nate is one of News Directors here at WebDCR, and a ’28 from Brunswick, ME. He’s also scared of lobsters. If he were stranded on a desert island he’d bring The Great American Bar Scene by Zach Bryan.
